DATA DICTIONARY — SMOKE TEST
=============================

Table: CUST_MASTER
Stores the master record for every customer account on the platform.
Each row represents one customer and holds their core identity and contact
attributes. No registration-status flag is present; all rows are considered
active customer accounts.

Column         Type          Notes
------         ----          -----
CUST_ID        INT           Primary key, auto-increment
FULL_NAME      VARCHAR(120)  Customer full name
EMAIL          VARCHAR(200)  Unique, used for login
REGION_CODE    CHAR(3)       ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 region

Table: SALES_ORD
Stores all sales orders placed by customers, covering every lifecycle state
from initial placement through to delivery or cancellation.

Column         Type          Notes
------         ----          -----
ORD_ID         INT           Primary key
CUST_ID        INT           Foreign key -> CUST_MASTER.CUST_ID
ORD_DATE       DATE          Date the order was placed
TOTAL_AMT      DECIMAL(12,2) Sum of all order line amounts
STATUS         VARCHAR(20)   Order lifecycle state: PENDING | CONFIRMED | SHIPPED | DELIVERED | CANCELLED (default: PENDING)
